---
title: "Related data resources and publications"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .card-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
.site-card {
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-left: 4px solid #2780e3;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  background: #fff;
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.site-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}
.pub-card {
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-left: 4px solid #adb5bd;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  background: #fff;
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.pub-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}
.card-title {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  line-height: 1.4;
}
.card-title a {
  color: #212529;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.card-title a:hover { color: #2780e3; }
.card-desc {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #495057;
  flex: 1;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.card-meta {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #6c757d;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}
.card-journal {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-style: italic;
  color: #495057;
  flex: 1;
}
.card-links {
  margin-top: auto;
  padding-top: 0.75rem;
}
.card-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 1px solid #2780e3;
  color: #2780e3;
  background: transparent;
  transition: background-color 0.15s, color 0.15s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.card-btn:hover {
  background: #2780e3;
  color: #fff;
}
</style>
```

## Related data resources

These resources may be useful in either extending or supplementing the data offered in the IRW.

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="site-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://wordbank.stanford.edu/" target="_blank">Wordbank</a></div>
<div class="card-desc">An open database of children's vocabulary development.</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://wordbank.stanford.edu/" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Visit →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="site-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://www.uni-potsdam.de/en/psych-methods/research/attentional-control-data-collection" target="_blank">Attentional Control Data Collection</a></div>
<div class="card-desc">Data from attentional control tasks.</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://www.uni-potsdam.de/en/psych-methods/research/attentional-control-data-collection" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Visit →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="site-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://preflib.github.io/PrefLib-Jekyll/" target="_blank">PrefLib</a></div>
<div class="card-desc">A library of preference data.</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://preflib.github.io/PrefLib-Jekyll/" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Visit →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="site-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://www.psychomodels.org/" target="_blank">PsychoModels</a></div>
<div class="card-desc">A database of formal models in psychology.</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://www.psychomodels.org/" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Visit →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="site-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://nomologicalnetwork.org/" target="_blank">ALIGNS</a></div>
<div class="card-desc">A method for exploring the nomological network of a scale.</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://nomologicalnetwork.org/" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Visit →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="site-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://openesmdata.org/about/" target="_blank">openESM</a></div>
<div class="card-desc">Repository of experience sampling datasets.</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://openesmdata.org/about/" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Visit →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="site-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://slesche.github.io/ted-site/" target="_blank">Truth Effect Database (TED)</a></div>
<div class="card-desc">Repository dedicated to research on the illusory truth effect.</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://slesche.github.io/ted-site/" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Visit →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="site-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://fearbase.org/" target="_blank">fearbase</a></div>
<div class="card-desc">A dynamically growing fear conditioning database.</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://fearbase.org/" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Visit →</a></div>
</div>

</div>

## Related publications

These publications are advancing psychometric research via analysis of larger volumes of data.

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.3758/s13428-021-01690-7" target="_blank">Scale length does matter: Recommendations for measurement invariance testing with categorical factor analysis and item response theory approaches</a></div>
<div class="card-meta">D'Urso ED, De Roover K, Vermunt JK, Tijmstra J · 2022</div>
<div class="card-journal">Behavior Research Methods</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.3758/s13428-021-01690-7" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Journal →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.3758/s13428-025-02717-z" target="_blank">Attentional control data collection: A resource for efficient data reuse</a></div>
<div class="card-meta">Haaf JM, Hoffstadt M, Lesche S · 2025</div>
<div class="card-journal">Behavior Research Methods</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.3758/s13428-025-02717-z" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Journal →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41562-025-02314-2" target="_blank">Statistical evidence in psychological networks</a></div>
<div class="card-meta">Huth KB, Haslbeck JM, Keetelaar S, van Holst RJ, Marsman M · 2025</div>
<div class="card-journal">Nature Human Behaviour</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41562-025-02314-2" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Journal →</a></div>
</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="card-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1037/met0000624" target="_blank">The dire disregard of measurement invariance testing in psychological science</a></div>
<div class="card-meta">Maassen E, D'Urso ED, Van Assen MA, Nuijten MB, De Roover K, Wicherts JM · 2023</div>
<div class="card-journal">Psychological Methods</div>
<div class="card-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1037/met0000624" class="card-btn" target="_blank">Journal →</a></div>
</div>

</div>
